creator: mcclain@looneys.net
text:
Greetings,

Shouldn't the port check for this dependency (autoconf > 2.1.2)?  i've been
tearing my hair out over this one for a while.  guess i should have looked
here first.   this stopped the rpm port from installing, which stops the
linux_base port as well.

Just a thought, keep up the incredible work.

Regards,

mcclain
